name: Crazy Descent
author: Poki
description: Crazy Descent is a racing game where speed and chaos collide! Race down wild tracks in the sky, dodge obstacles, and shove your rivals off the edge to claim victory. Win races to earn cash, then upgrade your car to blaze down even faster in the next round. Do you have what it takes to be the fastest on the craziest descent? How to play Crazy Descent? Speed Up: W or the up arrow key Turn left or right: A/D or the left or right arrow key Restart: R Who created Crazy Descent? Crazy Descent is created by AM-Games. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Crazy Descent for free? You can play Crazy Descent for free on Poki. Can I play Crazy Descent on mobile devices and desktop? Crazy Descent can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
